## Summary

What would you like to change?

## Why

Why is this change useful?

## Proposed approach

How do you expect to implement it?

## Impacted areas

- [ ] prompts
- [ ] policies
- [ ] workflows
- [ ] connectors
- [ ] control plane
- [ ] docs
- [ ] tests

## Risks or open questions

Anything the maintainer should weigh in on before work starts?
